branding.identity: Edunancial is a financial literacy and financial competency membership platform.
branding.longDescription: Edunancial is a membership platform dedicated to improving financial literacy and financial competency through structured learning resources, interactive tools, practical exercises, and technology-supported methods.
branding.publicDisclaimer: Edunancial is not a school, college, university, vocational institution, accredited educational institution, or degree-granting institution. Membership does not result in an academic degree, diploma, professional license, or regulated educational credential.
legal.translationReview: Human legal review recommended before publishing localized legal copy.
selector.defaultPrompt: Would you like to make this your default language?
auth.login.label: Member Login
auth.login.heading: Welcome Back
auth.login.subheading: Sign in to access your Financial Competency Dashboard.
auth.login.betaNote: Beta testers should sign in with their approved email address and enter the invitation pass number below on first login.
auth.register.label: Membership Registration
auth.register.heading: Create Your Account
auth.register.subheading: Begin building your Financial Competency today.
auth.register.betaNote: If you were invited as a Beta Tester, register with the approved email address first, then enter your pass number on first login to start the 72-hour beta window.
auth.errors.passwordWeak: Password does not meet security requirements.
auth.errors.mustAgree: You must agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
footer.identity: Edunancial is a financial literacy and financial competency membership platform.
footer.subtitle: Financial competency is built through disciplined action.
footer.disclaimer: Edunancial is not a school, college, university, vocational institution, accredited educational institution, or degree-granting institution. Membership does not result in an academic degree, diploma, professional license, or regulated educational credential. Edunancial provides informational content only — not financial, investment, tax, accounting, or legal advice.
dashboard.label: Member Dashboard
dashboard.description: Your North American learning experience keeps your subscription, learning paths, competency progress, certificates, downloads, and announcements in one accessible place.
dashboard.betaActive.heading: Beta Tester access is active
dashboard.betaActive.body: Your beta window began at first successful login and expires 72 hours later.
dashboard.betaActive.feedback: Please submit feedback before access ends so Edunancial can improve the membership platform before wider release.
dashboard.betaExpired.heading: Beta access has expired
dashboard.betaExpired.body: Your account, progress, and prior feedback are still available. Beta access ended 72 hours after your first successful login and did not auto-bill or auto-convert.
dashboard.betaExpired.upgrade: Continue with Individual Membership for $19.99/month whenever you are ready.
dashboard.tracks.heading: Your Learning Tracks
dashboard.stats.label: Activity Summary
dashboard.stats.competencyScoreDetail: Composite across RED, WHITE, and BLUE
dashboard.continue.heading: Continue Where You Left Off
dashboard.certDisclaimer: Certificates of Completion are issued for Edunancial modules. They are completion recognitions only — not academic degrees, professional licenses, or regulated credentials.
aiCoach.label: AI Financial Coach
aiCoach.description: The Edunancial AI Coach helps members move from financial literacy to practical decision-making with guided prompts, course recommendations, and action-oriented follow-up.
aiCoach.cta.label: Start with the AI Coach
aiCoach.cta.heading: Ready to accelerate your learning?
aiCoach.cta.description: The AI Coach is available to all active members. Start a session now and let it guide your next financial competency milestone.
aiCoach.languageNote: The AI Coach responds in your selected language.
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Edunancial is a financial literacy and financial competency membership platform. It helps members improve practical financial judgment through learning resources, assessments, tools, and guided support.
faq.q2: What do Red, White, and Blue mean?
faq.a2: Red covers Real Estate, White covers Paper Assets, and Blue covers Business. These three pillars remain the foundation of the platform.
faq.a3: Individual Membership is $19.99/month. Approved Organization Membership is $14.99/member/month for approved partners. The 100+ Member Organization Rate is $9.99 per active paid member/month with a minimum of 100 active paid members and a formal agreement.
faq.q4: Is Edunancial a school or accredited institution?
faq.a4: Edunancial is not a school, college, university, vocational institution, accredited educational institution, or degree-granting institution. Membership does not result in an academic degree, diploma, professional license, or regulated educational credential.
faq.a5: Members may receive Certificates of Completion for Edunancial modules. These are completion recognitions only and are not academic degrees, licenses, or regulated credentials.
faq.q6: How does Beta Tester access work?
faq.a6: Beta Tester access is $0, invitation only, tied to an approved email address, and begins at first successful login after valid redemption. Access expires 72 hours later unless an administrator explicitly extends it.
